scripts.build: npm run build:cloudbeds && npm run build:mews && npm run build:guesty && npm run build:olo
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:cloudbeds && npm run deploy:mews && npm run deploy:guesty && npm run deploy:olo
scripts.deploy:cloudbeds: npm run build:cloudbeds && surge public klaviyo-hotel-cloudbeds.surge.sh
scripts.deploy:mews: npm run build:mews && surge public klaviyo-hotel-mews.surge.sh
scripts.deploy:guesty: npm run build:guesty && surge public klaviyo-hotel-guesty.surge.sh
scripts.deploy:olo: npm run build:olo && surge public klaviyo-hotel-olo.surge.sh
